holdings.infoBox: CONX is an equity ETF with a total of 10 individual holdings. The top holdings are Goldman Finl Sq Trsry Inst 506 stock at 60.24%, Goldman Sachs Fin Gov 465 Institut at 26.50%, Dreyfus Govt Cash Man Ins at 16.51%, Coinbase Global at 13.45%, and Cash at 0.16%.

overview.description: The Direxion Daily COIN Bull 2X ETF (CONX) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in financials equity. The fund provides 2x leveraged exposure, less fees and expenses, to the daily price movement for shares of Coinbase Global, Inc. (NASDAQ: COIN). CONX was launched on Nov 19, 2025 and is issued by Direxion.
